title: breea praealta
intro: Breea praealta, also known as Mountain Breea or Mountain Breea Prickly Thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Breea praealta include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared for use as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
